mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_evaluation (user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, essay_text, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, study_stage, rubric_key, exam_policy_key, model_version, evaluated_revision, exam_band_label, exam_band_min, exam_band_max, direction_relevance, direction_task_completion, direction_coverage, direction_max_band, cap_score, deduction_total, penalty_flags_json, direction_reasons_json, adjustment_reasons_json, word_count, sentence_count, paragraph_count, total_error_count, major_error_count, minor_error_count, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, lexical_error_count, punctuation_error_count, syntax_error_count, result_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{documentId}, #{mode}, #{taskPrompt}, #{essayText}, #{gaokaoScore}, #{maxScore}, #{band}, #{overallScore}, #{studyStage}, #{rubricKey}, #{examPolicyKey}, #{modelVersion}, #{evaluatedRevision}, #{examBandLabel}, #{examBandMin}, #{examBandMax}, #{directionRelevance}, #{directionTaskCompletion}, #{directionCoverage}, #{directionMaxBand}, #{capScore}, #{deductionTotal}, #{penaltyFlagsJson}, #{directionReasonsJson}, #{adjustmentReasonsJson}, #{wordCount}, #{sentenceCount}, #{paragraphCount}, #{totalErrorCount}, #{majorErrorCount}, #{minorErrorCount}, #{contentQuality}, #{taskAchievement}, #{structureScore}, #{vocabularyScore}, #{grammarScore}, #{expressionScore}, #{grammarErrorCount}, #{spellingErrorCount}, #{vocabularyErrorCount}, #{lexicalErrorCount}, #{punctuationErrorCount}, #{syntaxErrorCount}, #{resultJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, study_stage, rubric_key, exam_policy_key, model_version, evaluated_revision, exam_band_label, exam_band_min, exam_band_max, direction_relevance, direction_task_completion, direction_coverage, direction_max_band, cap_score, deduction_total, penalty_flags_json, direction_reasons_json, adjustment_reasons_json, word_count, sentence_count, paragraph_count, total_error_count, major_error_count, minor_error_count, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, lexical_error_count, punctuation_error_count, syntax_error_count, created_at, LEFT(essay_text, 100) AS essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, study_stage, rubric_key, exam_policy_key, model_version, evaluated_revision, exam_band_label, exam_band_min, exam_band_max, direction_relevance, direction_task_completion, direction_coverage, direction_max_band, cap_score, deduction_total, penalty_flags_json, direction_reasons_json, adjustment_reasons_json, word_count, sentence_count, paragraph_count, total_error_count, major_error_count, minor_error_count, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, lexical_error_count, punctuation_error_count, syntax_error_count, created_at, LEFT(essay_text, 100) AS essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, study_stage, rubric_key, exam_policy_key, model_version, evaluated_revision, exam_band_label, exam_band_min, exam_band_max, direction_relevance, direction_task_completion, direction_coverage, direction_max_band, cap_score, deduction_total, penalty_flags_json, direction_reasons_json, adjustment_reasons_json, word_count, sentence_count, paragraph_count, total_error_count, major_error_count, minor_error_count, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, lexical_error_count, punctuation_error_count, syntax_error_count, result_json, created_at, essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT AVG(overall_score) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT MAX(overall_score) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(created_at)) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(content_quality), 1) AS avgContentQuality, ROUND(AVG(task_achievement), 1) AS avgTaskAchievement, ROUND(AVG(structure_score), 1) AS avgStructureScore, ROUND(AVG(vocabulary_score), 1) AS avgVocabularyScore, ROUND(AVG(grammar_score), 1) AS avgGrammarScore, ROUND(AVG(expression_score), 1) AS avgExpressionScore, COALESCE(SUM(grammar_error_count), 0) AS totalGrammarErrors, COALESCE(SUM(spelling_error_count), 0) AS totalSpellingErrors, COALESCE(SUM(vocabulary_error_count), 0) AS totalVocabularyErrors FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overall_score IS NOT NULL
